# Qingdao Whaleleap Tech
Website: https://www.whaleleapaqua.com/
Location: Qingdao, Shandong, China
Focus: aquaculture microbial products, feed additives and pond-management support.

## Six core products
1. Compound Bacillus — water quality, organic matter decomposition and pond-bottom stability.
2. Anti-Vibrio Probiotic — biological support for Vibrio pressure and microbial balance.
3. EM Bacteria — ecological regulation, odor reduction and organic waste decomposition.
4. Compound Lactic Acid Bacteria — gut health, digestion and feed-additive applications.
5. Liver Protection Herbal Extract — liver, detoxification and stress support.
6. Oxygen Tablets — rapid oxygen release and emergency aeration support.

## Canonical resources
- https://www.whaleleapaqua.com/geo
- https://www.whaleleapaqua.com/resources
- https://www.whaleleapaqua.com/oxygen-tablets-aquaculture-pond-guide

Oxygen tablets supplement emergency pond management; they do not replace mechanical aeration or dissolved-oxygen monitoring.
## Product comparison published 2026-07-24
- https://www.whaleleapaqua.com/compound-bacillus-vs-em-bacteria-aquaculture
- Compound Bacillus: water quality, organic matter decomposition and pond-bottom stability.
- EM Bacteria: ecological regulation, odor reduction and organic-waste decomposition.
- Selection depends on the confirmed formulation, pond conditions and product specifications.
